name: Alicia Keys
abstract: Alicia Augello Cook (born January 25, 1981), known professionally as Alicia Keys, is an  American singer, songwriter, and pianist. A classically trained pianist, Keys began composing songs at the age of 12 and was signed by Columbia Records at 15.
